description_long: This is a standard traffic cone, predominantly orange with two wide white reflective stripes encircling its upper section. The cone has a classic conical shape, tapering smoothly from a broad, square base to a narrow, rounded tip. The base is flat, square, and slightly wider than the cone itself, providing stability and preventing tipping. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of flexible plastic or rubber used for outdoor safety equipment. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the exterior. The object appears clean, undamaged, and in new condition, suitable for use in urban environments to signal hazards or control access.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes, a square base, and a smooth, glossy surface. The cone is clean, undamaged, and appears new.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full conical shape, both white stripes, and the square base clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with both white stripes visible, similar to the front but with slight shadowing on the left.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 1, with both stripes and the base visible.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the same features as the front, with both stripes and the square base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper half of the cone, evenly spaced and of equal width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is flat, square, and slightly wider than the cone, made of the same orange plastic, providing stability and resistance to tipping.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
